name: 机制路径与中介解释
description: 用于打开因果黑箱，写中介、路径、信念机制、未解释残差和替代机制。

expressions.note: anticipated 指未来情景下的心理预期，区别于已发生冲突。
expressions.example: Anticipated work-family conflict mediates the policy effect.

expressions.note: 用于提出尚未直接观察但可能解释结果的路径。
expressions.example: Other intervening mechanisms may remain unexplained.

expressions.note: 比 psychological factors 更有机制感，适合理论段提出黑箱。

expressions.en: the mechanisms through which X shapes Y
expressions.note: through which 能自然连接机制名词和结果变量。
expressions.example: We examine mechanisms through which policies shape intentions.

expressions.en: open the black box through mediation analysis
expressions.note: 把统计分析包装成解释贡献，而不是只列模型结果。
expressions.example: Mediation analysis opens the black box of policy effects.

clusters.meaning: 信念、成本和未解释机制

expressions.note: TPB 写作中的三分法，可作为机制簇整体记忆。
expressions.example: The model tests behavioral, normative, and control beliefs.

expressions.note: 适合经济/家庭决策理论，不只是说 cost is high。
expressions.example: People delay parenthood when perceived costs exceed benefits.

expressions.note: 用于说明哪类态度或规范对政策更敏感；语气比 changeable 更学术。
expressions.example: Perceived affordability may be more malleable to policy changes.

expressions.en: Nevertheless, a large proportion of the effects remains unexplained by...
expressions.note: 适合中介分析后避免过度声称，顺势提出替代机制。
expressions.example: Nevertheless, much of the effect remains unexplained by conflict.

clusters.meaning: 压力、角色和心理机制的精细表达

expressions.note: 适合写心理机制或角色理论，比 importance 更能表达某维度在情境中被激活。
expressions.example: The salience of parental roles may vary by age.

expressions.en: driven by X rather than Y
expressions.note: 比 caused by 更谨慎，适合机制拆分和反事实对照。
expressions.example: The change was driven by exchange rather than affinity.

expressions.en: Mark one dimension as the driver and another as non-driver.
expressions.note: 适合多维测量结果，避免把 closeness 一概而论。
expressions.example: Exchange, not affinity, drove the increase in closeness.

expressions.note: 常与 chronic 对照，用于区分即时冲击和长期压力。
expressions.example: Dissolution may result in acute stress.

expressions.note: 适合说明冲击的后果持续存在，不只是一次性事件。
expressions.example: Relationship instability can generate chronic stress.

clusters.meaning: 区分真正驱动因素和非驱动机制

expressions.note: 用于把压力机制拆成即时与长期两个层次。
expressions.example: Dissolution may generate acute and chronic stress.

expressions.en: adverse emotional, behavioral, and health outcomes
expressions.note: 并列范围完整，适合概括压力事件的多维后果。
expressions.example: Stress increases adverse emotional and behavioral outcomes.

expressions.note: 适合理论段把家庭事件连接到心理健康机制。
expressions.example: Dissolution is treated as a stressful life event.

expressions.en: The findings are mainly driven by X instead of Y.
expressions.note: instead of 比 rather than 更直接，适合结果解释。
expressions.example: The narrowing gap was driven by men instead of women.
